headline: Why PulteGroup Stock Is Falling After Earnings Beat

headline: AT&T Revenue Rises on Growth in Postpaid Phone, Internet Customers
summary: AT’s second-quarter earnings from continuing operations came in at 66 cents a share, compared with 62 cents a share a year earlier.
